rows.label: qev030401_MSG0001
rows.name:
The Growth are saying they'll prepare a
fitting position for you—Uzoma Vassago! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Stop your pointless resistance and obey!
Be eaten by this Simius right here, or
become an ally of the Growth... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0003
rows.name:
There's no simpler choice
than this, right!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Ah, it is a simple choice, da.
Because unlike you Caverns, the
Tree Clan is a proud clan, da... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0005
rows.name:
I would choose death over selling out my kin! No matter
how much you threaten me, it's a waste of time, zo.
If you want to kill me, just get it over with. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0006
rows.name: Nngh... nnnnngh!! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0007
rows.name: ...Wha!? Who are you!! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0008
rows.name:
Come any closer and I'll kill him, zo!
With one command from me, this Simius
will eat Uzoma in an instant, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0009
rows.name:
Wha... Damn it! I told you I'd
kill him if you came closer! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Heh, you've got guts, da! ...I
see. You came because my old man
asked you to, didn't you...? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod in affirmation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_JNK0020
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask how he knew.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0011
rows.name:
That recklessness... It's exactly
the kind of person my old man would
like, na. I figured as much, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0012
rows.name:
Then, pass this on to my old
man. Tell him I did not yield
to them until the very end. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0013
rows.name:
Tell him I died showing the courage of the Tree
Clan, which has not broken a single time in the
10,000 years we have fought the Cavern Clan, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0014
rows.name:
O Simius! I cannot help but feel
pity for you, being made to serve
such a vulgar Bias, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0015
rows.name:
The warrior right there will surely strike
you down soon! But before that... thoroughly
savor the taste of your final meal! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_JNK0030
rows.name: Throw[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_SEL0031
rows.name: Throw the Kepha Holly at the Simius.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_JNK0040
rows.name: Observe[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_SEL0041
rows.name: Watch how things unfold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0016
rows.name:
This is... Kepha Holly! The Simius
is losing its consciousness, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0017
rows.name: Wha...! What did you say!! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0018
rows.name:
I'm impressed you knew the
Simius hated this stuff, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0019
rows.name:
You're not just brave, you've got a working
brain too, da! Ha ha! A far cry from these
idiotic Cavern Clan bastards, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0020
rows.name:
Ggh... Daaaaamn iiiiiit! Even
without the Simius, you guys
are no match for me, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0021
rows.name:
I'll kill you... I'll kill
every last one of you, zo!! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0022
rows.name:
Ggh... If you want to die that
badly, I'll oblige you, zo! You
useless trash! Simius, eat him, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0023
rows.name: Gwah... Gwaaaaaaaah! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030401_MSG0024
rows.name:
...You're next, zo! Anyone who helps
the Tree Clan gets slaughtered, da! [ST:wait ]
